# clo_compute_keypair (Data Source)

Fetches a keypair by name

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clo_compute_keypair" "by_name" {
  project_id = "1e8ff0f7-0b8c-4ec5-a0a4-e30cea0db287"
  name       = "my-laptop"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the desired keypair
- `project_id` (String) ID of the project that owns the keypair

### Read-Only

- `created_in` (String) Timestamp the keypair was created
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `keypair_id` (String) ID of the requested keypair
- `public_key` (String) Public key of the keypair
